lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: Hello [sir/madam], can I tempt you with any of the dishes on our new menu?

lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: I hope you like what you see. Although all these premade dishes are good to eat - they were made by the last human assistant chef. He wasn't up to Chef's exacting standards - and you may find that they will

lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: not be accepted by some people as the 'real' thing.

lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: That's your choice [sir/madam], enjoy your stay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I'd like to sell some dishes.

lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: Mr Gianne is the one to talk to if you want to sell any dishes you've made yourself. He is the owner and head chef of this establishment. If on the other hand you are more interested in making food to deliver, which can

lines.speaker: Gnome Waiter
lines.text: be quite lucrative, you should talk to Mr Giannes son Aluft Gianne jnr. Just don't call him Lufty, he doesn't like it.
